mod_info.name: Shop
mod_info.summary: A server economy mod featuring GUI-based shops and recipe-based auto-pricing

version_info.changelog: Initial release — full shop system with buy/sell GUIs, recipe-based pricing, and player payments.

description.body:
A complete in-game economy for multiplayer servers. Players buy and sell any item in the game through intuitive GUIs, with prices automatically calculated from crafting recipes — no manual price config needed.

## Currency

All players start with a balance of **$0**. Earn money by selling items, spend it at the shop. Balances persist across sessions and are stored per-player on the server.

## Commands

- `/shop` — Opens the shop GUI with all items organized by creative tab
- `/sellhand` — Sells all matching items in your hand instantly
- `/sellgui` — Opens a drag-and-drop interface to sell items
- `/balance` (or `/bal`) — Shows your current balance
- `/pay <player> <amount>` — Transfer money to another player

{{image:0}}

## Shop System

### Buying

Open `/shop` and browse items by creative tab category. The shop automatically detects modded items — no configuration required.

- **Left-click** an item to open a detail buy menu with quantity input
- **Right-click** an item to quick-buy a full stack (auto-calculated by your balance)
- Toggle between **stack mode** and **single mode** in the detail view
- Hit **Max Afford** to buy as many as your balance allows
- Transparent GUI background so you can see the world while shopping

### Selling

Two ways to sell items:

**`/sellhand`** — Instantly sells all items matching the one in your hand.

**`/sellgui`** — Opens a drag-and-drop interface:
- Drag items from your inventory into the sell area
- Left-click inventory items to move them to sell slots
- Right-click to move just one item
- Tooltips show per-item sell price and total stack value
- Items are returned to your inventory if you close without selling

## Pricing Engine

Prices are **automatically calculated from crafting recipes** — zero manual configuration.

- **Base materials** (raw resources with no recipe): **$2** each
- **Crafted items**: priced from the sum of their ingredients
- **Uncraftable items** (no recipe and no base): **$1,000** each
- **Buy price**: 1.2× base price
- **Sell price**: 0.8× base price

This means the economy is self-balancing — rarer items cost more, common items cost less, and the spread between buy/sell prevents infinite money loops.

## Player-to-Player Payments

`/pay <player> <amount>` transfers money directly. Features:
- **Double-confirm** prompt to prevent accidental payments
- **Offline support** — pay players who aren't currently online
- **Transaction log** on the server console

## Compatibility

- **Server-side**: Required
- **Client-side**: Required (custom GUIs)
- **Modpacks**: Welcome — no special permission needed
- **Works with**: All Forge 1.12.2 mods (auto-detects modded items)
